_note: Aurora writer acme-prod-aurora-writer (db.r6g.4xlarge, 128 GB RAM). A naive line-item instinct sees 12% avg CPU and flags it as a downsize candidate. Principle 3 (#7): the BINDING CONSTRAINT for a DB is memory/connections, not CPU. FreeableMemory sits at ~1.7 GB (of 128 GB) and DatabaseConnections is rising toward the max — the instance is memory- and connection-bound, NOT downsizeable. Compute Optimizer correctly reports 'Optimized'. Window: 30d, 2026-04-08 to 2026-05-07.

FreeableMemory.Label: FreeableMemory
FreeableMemory._note: min ~1.6 GB, avg ~1.9 GB free of 128 GB total — the instance is memory-bound.

DatabaseConnections.Label: DatabaseConnections
DatabaseConnections._note: rising trend across the 30d window, approaching the parameter-group max_connections; connection-bound.
